title: Tomb Raider: Catalyst Delayed to 2028 Without Physical Edition on PlayStation
summary: Amazon Games confirms delay of new Lara Croft title, which will arrive in two years without disc support on Sony's console.

title: SEGA President Defends Physical Discs but Sees Digital Progress as Essential
summary: Shuji Utsumi reiterates SEGA's commitment to physical format, although he notes that digital expansion is crucial for the future.

title: Ubisoft Downplays Impact of Sony Removing Physical Discs on PlayStation
summary: Yves Guillemot states that the end of discs will not alter the industry and sees advantages and disadvantages in Sony's decision.

title: Blizzard Fires World of Warcraft Developer for Cheating in Dungeons
summary: The employee helped friends defeat bosses illegally, leading to his dismissal and community support.

title: Atari and Universal Sign Deal to Adapt Ten Classic Video Games to Film
summary: The video game studio struck a pact to bring franchises like Pong, Asteroids, and Centipede to the big screen.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Sales Soar with Over 3.5 Million Copies
summary: The remake of the pirate installment exceeded Ubisoft's expectations in just two weeks, although the company did not raise its forecasts.

title: Batman: Caped Crusader – Chronicles Announced, a Mystery Game Exclusive to Amazon Luna
summary: The title, based on the animated series, moves away from action to offer a cooperative crime-solving experience.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Suggests Halo 2 Remaster with Its Secret Ending
summary: The post-credits scene of the Halo remaster contains clues fueling rumors of a remake of the second installment.

title: Warhorse Studios Files 'Kingdom Come Salvation' as Possible New Medieval RPG
summary: The trademark application suggests the studio is preparing a sequel to Kingdom Come: Deliverance with possible multiplayer features.

title: PlayStation Network Suffers Massive Worldwide Outage
summary: PSN service experienced a widespread outage affecting thousands of players worldwide.

title: Nintendo Announces Enhanced Edition of Xenoblade Chronicles 2 for Switch 2
summary: The version will include new outfits for Pyra and Mythra, improvements to the combat system, and new content.

title: Microsoft Dusts Off Age of Empires 3's Baltic Powers Expansion and Will Release It in September
summary: The DLC, which had been cancelled, is revived to the delight of fans of the historical strategy saga.

title: EA Sports FC 27 Confirms Its First Open World Mode with a $150 Special Edition
summary: The football game introduces an open world and will be available in various editions, including a deluxe one.

title: European Commission Unconditionally Approves Saudi Arabian Purchase of EA
summary: The European body rules that the $55 billion acquisition does not raise competition concerns.

title: Full Trailer for Zach Cregger's New Resident Evil Movie Released
summary: The trailer shows the director's dark and bloody approach, dividing fans of the franchise.

title: Xbox Begins Testing Cloud Gaming with Advertisements
summary: Microsoft activates a new streaming mode with advertising support within the Xbox Insider program.
